package rulecoverage

func NegativeRepeatedSliceCloneInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "repeated_slice_clone_in_loop"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "slices.Clone(...) or similar whole-slice cloning observed inside loops."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
